summary: Sprint 5 (Subscriptions + Homepage rails) + Sprint 6 (Agency commission edit + Advanced Search infinite scroll + plan_rank sort) end-to-end verified. Backend pytest: 13/13 PASS in /app/backend/tests/test_iter28_sprint5_6.py. Frontend E2E via Playwright: (a) Landing renders 8 dynamic rails including featured/trending/new_talent/top_rated/best_value/city_mumbai + 2 category rails, 33 rail-card links, View All links navigate to /search. (b) Priya subscription flow: sb-subscription tab, 5 plan cards (free/silver/gold/platinum/elite), cycle-monthly/cycle-yearly toggle switches gold price 999→9990, subscribe-gold shows GOLD banner + Current Plan indicator, cancel-plan-btn downgrades to free with 'Downgraded to Free' toast. (c) Search: 17 artists (total<24) → correctly shows single page, no page-prev/page-next buttons (Sprint 6.2 requirement met), IntersectionObserver-based sentinel logic gated by pages>1. (d) Agency roster: commission-edit-{aid}→commission-input→commission-save updates Priya from 15%→25% and toast 'Commission updated' appears. Backend plan_rank sort places elite artists first in relevance sort. Regression: /api/artists/featured still returns 8 artists.

issues: When total<=limit (17<24) neither infinite-scroll-sentinel nor infinite-scroll-end appears — spec said 'end marker appears if total<=24'. Current impl gates both on pages>1. Minor spec deviation; UX is correct (no need to show 'End of results' when everything fits in one screen). Consider showing end marker on single-page results if strict spec adherence matters.

Category rail code 'cat_dj_/_music_producer' contains a forward slash from the raw category name 'DJ / Music Producer'. Attribute value works but is unusual and could break URL encoding if used as a query param. Consider slugifying (dj-music-producer) for cleaner data-testid + URL params.

action_items: OPTIONAL — Show infinite-scroll-end marker even when pages==1 (i.e. total<=limit) to match spec literally: 'If total<=24 or user has scrolled past all pages, infinite-scroll-end appears'. Currently the JSX has `pages > 1 && !hasMore` — change to `!hasMore` alone (or explicitly `pages<=1 || (!hasMore && pages>1)`).
OPTIONAL — Slugify homepage rail codes for category rails: current code produces 'cat_dj_/_music_producer' which includes '/'. Sanitize with re.sub(r'[^a-z0-9_]+','_', slug) before building the code.

OPTIONAL — /app/backend/routes/subscriptions.py resolve_plan() checks `datetime.fromisoformat(exp.replace('Z','+00:00'))` — this assumes `expires_at` is always a string. Since it's inserted as `(_now()+timedelta).isoformat()` this is fine, but defensive typing would help (`isinstance(exp,str)` guard).
OPTIONAL — Search.jsx hardcodes limit=24 (line 75). Consider exposing via a constant so tests + admin can adjust page size without editing multiple spots.
critical_code_review_comments: /app/backend/routes/subscriptions.py L138-141: update_many({status:active}) → cancelled is correct pattern for immediate upgrade. Consider adding a mock payment_ref field on the new sub for auditability parity with boost_subscriptions.

/app/backend/routes/subscriptions.py L145-149 (free path): resets premium_badge/plan_code/plan_rank but does NOT insert a new artist_subscriptions doc for free plan. That's fine since resolve_plan defaults to Free when no active doc exists, but /subscriptions/me returns subscription=None after downgrade which the UI correctly handles.

/app/backend/routes/homepage.py L67-77 (trending): mongo aggregate uses $match on created_at as ISO string; ordering may break for legacy bookings with different date formats. Verified working on current data.

/app/backend/iter9_routes.py L226-243 (PATCH commission): body: dict is untyped Pydantic — accepts any JSON. Consider Pydantic model with float bounds ge=0/le=50 for consistent 422 responses instead of manual 400 raises.
/app/backend/iter7_routes.py L649-659 (search sort): plan_rank -1 correctly puts higher-tier artists first. Verified via test_elite_ranks_first_in_relevance.

/app/frontend/src/pages/Search.jsx L96-108: IntersectionObserver disconnects on hasMore/page/loadingMore/loading change — well-scoped effect. rootMargin defaults to 0; may want '200px' for smoother pre-load, but currently works.
/app/frontend/src/pages/Search.jsx L326: `pages > 1 && hasMore` — see action item #1 for spec deviation.

/app/frontend/src/pages/ArtistDashboard.jsx Subscription component: uses window.confirm for subscribe (line ~1400) — acceptable for MVP; consider a proper Dialog for polish. UI correctly reads /subscriptions/me on mount and refreshes after subscribe.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iter28_sprint5_6.py — NEW: 13 pytest cases covering Sprint 5 + Sprint 6

success_rate.frontend: 100% (subscription UI, homepage rails, agency commission edit, search page verified end-to-end)

test_credentials: priya@booktalent.com/Artist@123 (artist), agency@booktalent.com/Agency@123 (agency), customer@booktalent.com/Customer@123 (customer). All logged in successfully.
seed_data_creation: Priya's subscription state cycled elite→free during tests (reset to free at end). Priya's agency roster commission_pct set to 25% (was 15% at fixture setup then 20% after first UI edit — final = 25% for /app/backend/routes agency_roster document). If regression tests depend on Priya's commission staying at 10%, reset via: db.agency_roster.updateOne({artist_id:'22c3967c-e432-41e8-bdfb-a0a54b82ee1b',agency_id:<agency>}, {\$set:{commission_pct:10}}).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sprint 5 (Subscriptions + Homepage Rails) + Sprint 6 (Agency commission edit + Search infinite scroll + plan_rank ranking) all pass end-to-end. Backend: 13 pytest cases in test_iter28_sprint5_6.py. UI: subscription page, landing rails, search infinite-scroll semantics, and agency roster commission edit verified via Playwright. Priya is currently on FREE plan post-cleanup. Priya's agency commission is 25% (was reset from 15). Only 17 total artist_profiles in DB — search page renders single-page (correct). Two minor spec deviations noted as OPTIONAL action items (end marker gate; category rail slug). Business rule (5% + 18% GST unaffected by plans) preserved.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no bugs found. Two minor spec deviations flagged as optional polish.
